The Tin Woodman requests a heart. Oz uses shears to cut into the Woodman's tin chest, inserts a silk-and-sawdust heart, and solders the metal shut. The Woodman experiences an immediate emotional awakening.
Desperation $\rightarrow$ Physical Vulnerability $\rightarrow$ Joy/Emotional Overflow.

The Tin Woodman experiences an immediate emotional overflow.
Oz cuts into the tin chest, inserts the silk heart, and solders the metal shut.
